title: Jamaican Frittata
description: A Caribbean twist on the classic Italian egg dish, featuring spicy jamaican seasoning and flaky texture.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, jamaican seasoning, and shredded cheese (if using).
Pour the egg mixture over one half of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the egg mixture, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little bit of water and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the frittata on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
